mapper.select: SELECT id, title, author, price, publish_date, description, cover_url, cover_thumb_list, cover_thumb_detail FROM book
SELECT id, title, author, price, publish_date, description, cover_url, cover_thumb_list, cover_thumb_detail FROM book WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book (title, author, price, publish_date, description, cover_url, cover_thumb_list, cover_thumb_detail) VALUES (#{title}, #{author}, #{price}, #{publishDate}, #{description}, #{coverUrl}, #{coverThumbList}, #{coverThumbDetail})
mapper.update: UPDATE book SET title = #{title}, author = #{author}, price = #{price}, publish_date = #{publishDate}, description = #{description}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, cover_thumb_list = #{coverThumbList}, cover_thumb_detail = #{coverThumbDetail} WHERE id = #{id}
